Info

Defines abstract class IProgressBar with method(s). Interface for progress bar component.

class ats_utilities.splasher.iprogress_bar.IProgressBar[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class IProgressBar with method(s). Interface for progress bar component.

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
set_level - Sets level of progress.
plot_progress - Plots progress.
set_and_plot - Sets and plots progress.
__str__ - Returns the progress bar as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract plot_progress(columns: int) → None[source]¶

Plots progress.

Parameters:

columns (<int>) – Columns for open console session.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract set_and_plot(level: int, columns: int) → None[source]¶

Sets and plots progress.

Parameters:

  • level (<int>) – Level of progress.

  • columns (<int>) – Columns for open console session.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract set_level(level: int) → None[source]¶

Sets level of progress.

Parameters:

level (<int>) – Level of progress.

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
